message:
feat(engine): add optimization class, validity epochs, and revocation to constrained ambient benchmark lane

Extends ProofAttributionSample with optimization_class tracking, validity/
evaluation epoch fields, rollback tokens, and a revoked flag. Adds four new
error codes (FE-CABL-1007 through FE-CABL-1010) for proof optimization
mismatch, expiry, revocation, and conflicting claims.

New validation logic:
- Verify optimization_class matches validated_optimization_class
- Check proof validity against evaluation epoch (expiry detection)
- Enforce revocation status before benchmark attribution
- Detect conflicting proof claims across samples in the same lane

Includes serde defaults for backward-compatible deserialization of existing
fixture data and minor test updates for the expanded schema.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -37,10 +37,16 @@ fn attribution(
     ProofAttributionSample {
         proof_id: proof_id.to_string(),
         specialization_id: specialization_id.to_string(),
+        optimization_class: "ifc_check_elision".to_string(),
+        validated_optimization_class: "ifc_check_elision".to_string(),
         constrained_throughput_ops_per_sec,
         without_proof_throughput_ops_per_sec,
         constrained_latency_p95_ns,
         without_proof_latency_p95_ns,
+        validity_epoch: Some(10),
+        evaluation_epoch: Some(10),
+        rollback_token: Some(format!("rollback-{proof_id}-{specialization_id}")),
+        revoked: false,
     }
 }
